question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists the main sections of the thesis but does not explicitly number or title them as chapters.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes the contents of each section, providing a clear overview of what will be covered in each part of the thesis.

question: Structure
feedback: While the text provides an outline of the thesis structure, it could benefit from a clearer indication of how the sections relate to one another and build upon each other.
